---
name: Polygon-derived correction
about: Surface centroid, area, bounding-box, or coastline values that diverge from authoritative sources
title: "[Polygon] "
labels: ["polygon-correction"]
---

## Province or administrative unit

- TIS-1099 code (or ADM2 / ADM3 code):
- Province / district / subdistrict name:

## Affected column

- [ ] `centroid_lat` / `centroid_lon`
- [ ] `area_km2` / `area_rai`
- [ ] `bbox_minlat` / `bbox_minlon` / `bbox_maxlat` / `bbox_maxlon`
- [ ] `coastline_length_km`
- [ ] `bordering_countries` / `has_international_border`

## Current value

## Authoritative value (proposed)

## Source for the authoritative value

Please cite the source for the proposed correct value. Acceptable sources include:

- Royal Forest Department (RFD) published figures for provincial area
- HDX RTSD shapefile measurements
- Government cadastral data
- Peer-reviewed academic measurements with documented methodology

## Magnitude of divergence

Describe the size of the discrepancy and any impact on downstream analyses.
